# clearpass_network_devices (Data Source)

Retrieves a list of ClearPass network devices, optionally filtered.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch all network devices
data "clearpass_network_devices" "all" {
}

output "all_devices" {
  value = data.clearpass_network_devices.all.network_devices
}

# Fetch network devices using a JSON filter
data "clearpass_network_devices" "filtered" {
  filter = "{\"name\":{\"$contains\":\"Aruba\"}}"
}

output "aruba_devices" {
  value = data.clearpass_network_devices.filtered.network_devices
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `calculate_count` (Boolean) Whether to calculate the total item count.
- `filter` (String) JSON filter expression specifying the items to return.
- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of items to return.
- `offset` (Number) Zero based offset to start from.
- `sort` (String) Sort ordering for returned items.

### Read-Only

- `network_devices` (Attributes List) List of network devices matching the query. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_devices))

<a id="nestedatt--network_devices"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_devices`

Read-Only:

- `attributes` (Map of String) Additional attributes.
- `cli_config` (Attributes) CLI Configuration details. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_devices--cli_config))
- `coa_capable` (Boolean) Flag indicating CoA capability.
- `coa_port` (Number) CoA port number.
- `description` (String) Description of the network device.
- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the network device.
- `ip_address` (String) IP or Subnet Address of the network device.
- `nad_groups` (List of String) List of NAD group names this device belongs to.
- `name` (String) Name of the network device.
- `onconnect_enforcement` (Attributes) OnConnect Enforcement settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_devices--onconnect_enforcement))
- `radsec_config` (Attributes) RadSec settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_devices--radsec_config))
- `radsec_enabled` (Boolean) Flag indicating RadSec capability.
- `snmp_read` (Attributes) SNMP read settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_devices--snmp_read))
- `snmp_write` (Attributes) SNMP write settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_devices--snmp_write))
- `vendor_id` (Number) Vendor ID of the network device.
- `vendor_name` (String) Vendor Name of the network device.

<a id="nestedatt--network_devices--cli_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_devices.cli_config`

Read-Only:

- `command_prompt_regex` (String) Command prompt regex.
- `enable_password` (String) Enable password. Not returned by the API.
- `enable_prompt_regex` (String) Enable prompt regex.
- `password` (String) CLI password. Not returned by the API.
- `password_prompt_regex` (String) Password prompt regex.
- `port` (Number) SSH/Telnet port number.
- `type` (String) Access type.
- `username` (String) CLI username.
- `username_prompt_regex` (String) Username prompt regex.


<a id="nestedatt--network_devices--onconnect_enforcement"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_devices.onconnect_enforcement`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Flag indicating if enabled.
- `ports` (String) Port names.


<a id="nestedatt--network_devices--radsec_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_devices.radsec_config`

Read-Only:

- `cn_regex` (String) Common Name Regular Expression String.
- `expiry_date` (String) Issuer CA Certificate Expiry Date.
- `san_regex` (String) Subject Alternate Name Regular Expression String.
- `serial_number` (String) Serial Number of a Certificate.
- `src_override_ip` (String) Source Override IP.
- `subject_dn` (String) Issuer CA Certificate Subject DN.
- `validate_cert` (String) Certificate validation method.


<a id="nestedatt--network_devices--snmp_read"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_devices.snmp_read`

Read-Only:

- `auth_key` (String) Authentication key. Not returned by the API.
- `auth_protocol` (String) Authentication protocol.
- `community_string` (String) Community string of the network device. Not returned by the API.
- `force_read` (Boolean) This field is deprecated.
- `privacy_key` (String) Privacy key. Not returned by the API.
- `privacy_protocol` (String) Privacy protocol.
- `read_arp_info` (Boolean) Enable to read ARP table from this device.
- `security_level` (String) Security level of the network device.
- `snmp_version` (String) SNMP version of the network device.
- `user` (String) SNMPv3 username.
- `zone_name` (String) Policy Manager Zone name associated with the network device.


<a id="nestedatt--network_devices--snmp_write"></a>
### Nested Schema for `network_devices.snmp_write`

Read-Only:

- `auth_key` (String) Authentication key. Not returned by the API.
- `auth_protocol` (String) Authentication protocol.
- `community_string` (String) Community string. Not returned by the API.
- `default_vlan` (Number) Default VLAN.
- `privacy_key` (String) Privacy key. Not returned by the API.
- `privacy_protocol` (String) Privacy protocol.
- `security_level` (String) Security level.
- `snmp_version` (String) SNMP version.
- `user` (String) SNMPv3 username.
